forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Keith, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the north. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly east of Ceduna. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then turning south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 26.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.
